_meta.schema: pathname → 中文一句话产品描述（解释 *这个东西是什么*，不是产品分类）
_meta.method: manual translations bootstrapped from KS English blurb + title; can be extended via LLM in scraper
_meta.guidance: Keep each blurb 8–28 Chinese chars. Lead with product type, then 1–2 key features. Mention scale/price-tier only when distinctive.
